name: algomentor
description: AI-powered DSA roadmap and analytics platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.security:audit: npm audit --omit=dev && npm audit --omit=dev --prefix server && npm audit --omit=dev --prefix client
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
